description: Composition Red and white Liverpool football club jersey in 100% polyester, engineered with Climacool technology, has a crew neck, authentic Liverpool Football club badge appliqué d on the chest, widely spaced pin stripes in red and golden on the shoulders and brandmark on the chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in lukewarm water below 40 degrees, using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Warm iron Do not dry clean Do not iron directly on print/trims/ logo Celebrate the spirit of those unbeatable lads from Liverpool in this adidas Liverpool FC Away Jersey. The Climacool ventilation keeps heat and sweat away, allowing you to concentrate on the sport. Team this with sportswear for unparalleled comfort. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6.1'', Chest- 38.5& rdquo
